news.title:
CESC Ltd opened gap down on 2 Mar 2026, dropping Rs 10.8 to Rs 140.85.
The decline reflects market concerns and negative momentum in the power sector.
news.summary:
CESC Ltd opened gap down on 2 Mar 2026, dropping Rs 10.8 to Rs 140.85.
The decline reflects market concerns and negative momentum in the power sector.

news.title:
CESC's subsidiary, Purvah Green Power, won a 250 MW wind power project from SECI.
The project, under competitive bidding, has a 25-year term with a tariff of Rs 3.69/kWh.
news.summary:
CESC's subsidiary, Purvah Green Power, won a 250 MW wind power project from SECI.
The project, under competitive bidding, has a 25-year term with a tariff of Rs 3.69/kWh.

news.title:
CESC Ltd reports revenue and profitability decline in Dec 2025 quarter.
Mojo Grade downgraded from Hold to Sell, reflecting investor caution.
news.summary:
CESC Ltd reports revenue and profitability decline in Dec 2025 quarter.
Mojo Grade downgraded from Hold to Sell, reflecting investor caution.

news.title:
CESC Ltd's Board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending 31 Dec 2025.
The statutory auditors provided a limited review report, confirming no material misstatements in the results.
news.summary:
CESC Ltd's Board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending 31 Dec 2025.
The statutory auditors provided a limited review report, confirming no material misstatements in the results.

news.title:
CESC Q3 EBITDA rises 30% YoY to ₹7.8B from ₹6B, showing strong growth.
EBITDA margin improves to 19.5% vs 17.1% YoY, indicating better profitability.
news.summary:
CESC Q3 EBITDA rises 30% YoY to ₹7.8B from ₹6B, showing strong growth.
EBITDA margin improves to 19.5% vs 17.1% YoY, indicating better profitability.

news.title:
CESC Ltd will participate in investor conferences in Mumbai from 9th to 12th Feb 2026.
Conferences include Systematix, Nuvama, and Axis Capital events, held physically per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
CESC Ltd will participate in investor conferences in Mumbai from 9th to 12th Feb 2026.
Conferences include Systematix, Nuvama, and Axis Capital events, held physically per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
CESC Ltd subsidiary signed an MoU for a 3 GW solar cell module plant.
The project includes a 60 MW solar plant, R&D lab, with Rs. 3,800 cr investment in UP.
news.summary:
CESC Ltd subsidiary signed an MoU for a 3 GW solar cell module plant.
The project includes a 60 MW solar plant, R&D lab, with Rs. 3,800 cr investment in UP.

news.title:
CESC Green Power partners with Odisha govt for ₹4,500 crore solar cell, chemistry cell, and power plant projects.
Projects include 3 GW solar cell production, 5 GWh chemistry cell pack, and 60 MW captive power plant.
news.summary:
CESC Green Power partners with Odisha govt for ₹4,500 crore solar cell, chemistry cell, and power plant projects.
Projects include 3 GW solar cell production, 5 GWh chemistry cell pack, and 60 MW captive power plant.

news.title:
CESC's subsidiary, Purvah Green Power, got LOA from REMC for 180 MW renewable energy project.
The project involves round-the-clock power supply for 25 years.
news.summary:
CESC's subsidiary, Purvah Green Power, got LOA from REMC for 180 MW renewable energy project.
The project involves round-the-clock power supply for 25 years.

news.title:
CESC's unit issued a binding LOI to Klasscorp Solutions for consultancy services.
The consultancy is for a 250 MW wind farm project in Karnataka.
news.summary:
CESC's unit issued a binding LOI to Klasscorp Solutions for consultancy services.
The consultancy is for a 250 MW wind farm project in Karnataka.

news.title:
CESC's subsidiary, Purvah Green, partners with Klasscorp for consultancy on a 250 MW Bijapur wind farm project in Karnataka.
CESC reported Q2 net profit up 20.4% YoY at ₹425 crore; revenue grew 12% to ₹5,267 crore with EBITDA rising 18.4%.
news.summary:
CESC's subsidiary, Purvah Green, partners with Klasscorp for consultancy on a 250 MW Bijapur wind farm project in Karnataka.
CESC reported Q2 net profit up 20.4% YoY at ₹425 crore; revenue grew 12% to ₹5,267 crore with EBITDA rising 18.4%.

news.title:
CESC Ltd faces a Rs. 9.3 Cr tax demand for FY 2021-22 under CGST and WBGST Acts.
The company plans to appeal the order, with financial impact uncertain until resolved.
news.summary:
CESC Ltd faces a Rs. 9.3 Cr tax demand for FY 2021-22 under CGST and WBGST Acts.
The company plans to appeal the order, with financial impact uncertain until resolved.

news.title:
CESC's subsidiary Deshraj Solar signed a contract with Toolfab for 91 wind turbine towers.
The 300 MW wind project will be developed in Andhra Pradesh within 12 months.
news.summary:
CESC's subsidiary Deshraj Solar signed a contract with Toolfab for 91 wind turbine towers.
The 300 MW wind project will be developed in Andhra Pradesh within 12 months.

news.title:
CESC Ltd to join Morgan Stanley India Industrials & Energy Seminar on Dec 11, 2025.
Event will be held virtually under Investor Group meetings per Regulation 30 (LODR).
news.summary:
CESC Ltd to join Morgan Stanley India Industrials & Energy Seminar on Dec 11, 2025.
Event will be held virtually under Investor Group meetings per Regulation 30 (LODR).

news.title:
CESC targets 3.2 GW renewable energy capacity by FY29 in Phase I.
Phase II aims 10 GW renewable energy capacity by FY32.
news.summary:
CESC targets 3.2 GW renewable energy capacity by FY29 in Phase I.
Phase II aims 10 GW renewable energy capacity by FY32.

news.title:
CESC plans ₹1,000 Cr investment in network, reliability, and metering upgrades.
The investment is scheduled over the next 5 years as per the investor presentation.
news.summary:
CESC plans ₹1,000 Cr investment in network, reliability, and metering upgrades.
The investment is scheduled over the next 5 years as per the investor presentation.

news.title:
CESC Ltd's investor presentation highlights a Rs 42,100 Cr revenue and Rs 7,900 Cr EBITDA for FY25.
The company emphasizes its power business, renewable energy targets, and growth plans.
news.summary:
CESC Ltd's investor presentation highlights a Rs 42,100 Cr revenue and Rs 7,900 Cr EBITDA for FY25.
The company emphasizes its power business, renewable energy targets, and growth plans.

news.title:
CESC Ltd announces participation in investor conferences on Dec 1-2, 2025.
Event is a Non-Deal Roadshow in Singapore, disclosed under SEBI Regulation 30.
news.summary:
CESC Ltd announces participation in investor conferences on Dec 1-2, 2025.
Event is a Non-Deal Roadshow in Singapore, disclosed under SEBI Regulation 30.

news.title:
CESC receives approval for a 45B rupee investment in a manufacturing facility.
The investment will be executed in three phases.
news.summary:
CESC receives approval for a 45B rupee investment in a manufacturing facility.
The investment will be executed in three phases.

news.title:
CESC's unit gains initial approval from Odisha's High-Level Clearance Authority.
Approval enables potential advancements in Odisha for CESC Limited.
news.summary:
CESC's unit gains initial approval from Odisha's High-Level Clearance Authority.
Approval enables potential advancements in Odisha for CESC Limited.
